__meta.source: FRED — Federal Reserve Economic Data (synthetic fixture for refinery testing; not for production analysis)
__meta.note: National macro indicators (SOFR + US CPI YoY). Series ids align with real FRED series so the live swap is one-line. State-level (FL) indicators live in macro-florida.sample.json.

rows.label: Secured Overnight Financing Rate
rows.context: SOFR has eased ~100bp from its 2025 peak as the Fed has begun cutting; floating-rate CRE debt is repricing lower.

rows.label: US CPI (All Items) Year-over-Year
rows.context: Headline CPI has cooled toward the 2% target; shelter is the remaining sticky component.
